modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Speakers not working during Zoom meetings on Windows.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to join a Zoom meeting, right? But my computer speakers just won't play any sound at all. It's super frustrating because I can't hear anything, and I don't know why it's happening.
short_description: Speakers not working during Zoom meetings on Windows.
description: So, I was trying to join a Zoom meeting, right? But my computer speakers just won't play any sound at all. It's super frustrating because I can't hear anything, and I don't know why it's happening.
